zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Hermann von Frohburg I於大約1096年出生時，他的父親Volmar von Frohburg Count27歲，母親Sophie de Bar Mousson31歲。他於1122年與Countess Of Frohburg在巴登阿赤 斯塔特武拉賀結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1132年在德國薩辛可萊斯 波納福洛賀包格享年37歲。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Hermann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Hermann von Frohburg I was born about 1096, his father, Volmar von Frohburg Count, was 27 and his mother, Sophie de Bar Mousson, was 31. He married Countess Of Frohburg in 1122, in Urach, Amt Neustadt, Baden. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1132, in Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Saxony, Germany, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Hermann von Frohburg I est né environ 1096, son père, Volmar von Frohburg Count, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Sophie de Bar Mousson, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Countess Of Frohburg en 1122, à Urach, Amt Neustadt, Baden. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1132, à Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Sachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.Frohburg, Borna, Leipzig, Saxony, German: Frohburg, Kreis Geithain, Bezirk Leipzig, Deutsche Demokratische Republik
de.lifeSummary: Als Graf Hermann von Frohburg I um 1096 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Volmar von Frohburg Count 27 und seine Mutter Sophie de Bar Mousson 31. Er hat 1122 in Urach, Amt Neustadt, Baden Countess Of Frohburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1132 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Sachsen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Hermann von Frohburg I è nato il circa 1096, il suo padre, Volmar von Frohburg Count, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Sophie de Bar Mousson, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Countess Of Frohburg nel 1122, nel Urach, Amt Neustadt, Baden. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1132, nel Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Sachsen, Germania, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Graf Hermann von Frohburg Iが約1096年に生まれた時，父Volmar von Frohburg Countは27歳，母Sophie de Bar Moussonは31歳であった。1122年にバデンアムト ネウスタトウラチでCountess Of Frohburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1132年にドイツサチセンクレイス ボルナフロhブルグで37歳で死去した。

ko.Frohburg, Borna, Leipzig, Saxony, German: 동독 베지르크 레이p지그 크레이스 그이스언 프로h버그
ko.lifeSummary: Graf Hermann von Frohburg I(이)가 대략 1096년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Volmar von Frohburg Count(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Sophie de Bar Mousson(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1122년 바든 아트 니우스타드트 라치에서 Countess Of Frohburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1132년 독일 작센 크레이스 본아 프로h버그에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Hermann von Frohburg I nasceu aproximadamente 1096, seu pai, Volmar von Frohburg Count, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Sophie de Bar Mousson, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Countess Of Frohburg em 1122, em Urach, Amt Neustadt, Baden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1132, em Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Sachsen, Alemanha, com 37 anos.

ru.Frohburg, Borna, Leipzig, Saxony, German: фрохбург, крис джитан, безирк липзиг, Восточная Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Hermann von Frohburg I родился около 1096 г., его отцу по имени Volmar von Frohburg Count было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophie de Bar Mousson, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Countess Of Frohburg в 1122 г. в местности урэич, амт неустадт, баден. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1132 г. в местности фрохбург, крис борна, сачсен, Германия в возрасте 37 лет.

Se casó con Countess Of Frohburg en 1122, en Urach, Amt Neustadt, Baden. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
